name: stress_recovery_window_summary
primary_question: What bounded Stress Recovery posture is represented by the committed draft eval example without presenting it as a current repeated-window proof family?
derivation_rule: resolve the committed aoa-stress-recovery-window example receipt to its draft aoa-evals example report and derive one reference summary plus suppression posture
owner_truth_inputs: future activated aoa-evals stress-recovery receipts and reports
authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local stressor receipts, bounded eval reports, and route-owner recovery guidance.
